summary: See clues file for full details. 3 tossups, 8 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 3 tossups and 8 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: John Boultbee's depiction of a celebrated example of these animals inspired the hilarious right angles in other images by John Porter and Henry Stafford.
examples: John Boultbee's depiction of a celebrated example of these animals inspired the hilarious right angles in other images by John Porter and Henry Stafford.

clues.clue: Paulus Potter made a monumental portrait of one of these animals that rivaled The Night Watch in popularity.
examples: Paulus Potter made a monumental portrait of one of these animals that rivaled The Night Watch in popularity.

clues.clue: A portrait by Edouard Dubufe  shows a French artist in black draping her arm over one of these animals; she had earlier painted two groups of them in a (*) diagonal composition found in the Musee d'Orsay.
examples: A portrait by Edouard Dubufe  shows a French artist in black draping her arm over one of these animals; she had earlier painted two groups of them in a (*) diagonal composition found in the Musee d'Orsay.

clues.clue: A black one of these animals is surrounded by crows in a depressing work by Van Gogh.
examples: A black one of these animals is surrounded by crows in a depressing work by Van Gogh.

clues.clue: Regionalist works titled for them include John Steuart Curry's Ajax and Thomas Hart Benton's Achelous and Hercules.
examples: Regionalist works titled for them include John Steuart Curry's Ajax and Thomas Hart Benton's Achelous and Hercules.

clues.clue: A vacation inspired Edouard Manet to paint these animals surrounded by garishly dressed figures in a circular ring.
examples: A vacation inspired Edouard Manet to paint these animals surrounded by garishly dressed figures in a circular ring.

clues.clue: Yellow and red blotches surround a lounging deer in a painting this artist did on a palette.
examples: Yellow and red blotches surround a lounging deer in a painting this artist did on a palette.

clues.clue: A traveling wild west show inspired this artist's meeting with, and portrait of, Buffalo Bill.
examples: A traveling wild west show inspired this artist's meeting with, and portrait of, Buffalo Bill.

clues.clue: The utopian socialism of this artist's father is discussed in an essay that describes the stronger "pathetic fallacy" in the work of Edwin Landseer.
examples: The utopian socialism of this artist's father is discussed in an essay that describes the stronger "pathetic fallacy" in the work of Edwin Landseer.

clues.clue: For a large painting compared to the Parthenon frieze, this artist was assisted by Nathalie Micas.
examples: For a large painting compared to the Parthenon frieze, this artist was assisted by Nathalie Micas.

clues.clue: Linda Nochlin's essay "Why Have There Been No Great (*) Women Artists?" extensively discusses this artist, who may have been inspired by George Sand for a painting depicting teams of oxen being driven in a field.
examples: Linda Nochlin's essay "Why Have There Been No Great (*) Women Artists?" extensively discusses this artist, who may have been inspired by George Sand for a painting depicting teams of oxen being driven in a field.

clues.clue: This artist of Ploughing in the Nivernais donned trousers to paint a tree-lined boulevard along which dealers sell the title animals.
examples: This artist of Ploughing in the Nivernais donned trousers to paint a tree-lined boulevard along which dealers sell the title animals.
